basic_details.job_title: NIELIT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT)
basic_details.post_name: Project Engineer (IoT), Project Associate (Training), Project Engineer (VLSI), Project Engineer (Full Stack Development), Business Development Executive, Office Assistant
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT) has officially announced the Various Posts Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on 15-05-2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the maximum age criteria of 45 years and hold qualifications such as B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT/Electronics/Applied Electronics/Physics/Statistics/Mathematics), MBA, or ITI (Electrical) can now submit their online applications from 15-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT/Electronics/Applied Electronics/Physics/Statistics/Mathematics), MBA, ITI (Electrical)
qualification.details: Project Engineer (IoT): B.E/ B.Tech/ M.E/M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Electrical and Electronics Engineering/Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering/Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or NIELIT B-level or MCA/ M.Sc in Computer Science/ Statistics/ Mathematics with Good knowledge of Programming with minimum 2 years past qualification experience in IOT domain. Project Associate (Training): B.E/ B. Tech. (Computer Science/Computer Engg/ Information Technology/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering/ Electronics and Instrumentation/ Electronics/Electronics & Communication), M.Sc (Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics/ Physics) or equivalent with First class from recognized university/institution. Project Engineer (VLSI): B.E/ B. Tech. (Electronics and Communication Engineering/Computer Science/Computer Engg/ Information Technology/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering/ Electronics and Instrumentation/Electronics & Communication), M.Sc (Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics/ Physics) or equivalent with First class from a recognized university/institution. Project Engineer (Full Stack Development): B.E/ B.Tech/ M.E/M.Tech in Electronics & Communication/ Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or NIELIT B-level/MCA/M.Sc in Computer Science, One year experience in Software Development and Testing. Business Development Executive: BE/B.Tech/M.Sc./MBA/MCA from a recognized University/Institution (or equivalent) with 3 years of experience in Training Coordination, Business Development, Academic Coordination, Skill Development, HR, or Placement-related activities. Office Assistant: Must Have passed matriculation with ITI electrical trade or equivalent from a recognized board. Must have minimum of 4 years of experience in Electrical, UPS, DG Set maintenance, Supporting day to day admin office activities.

selection_process: Online Application and Document Upload Shortlisting after Verification Online Interview/Test Written Test or Skill Test (if required)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIELIT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIELIT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIELIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NIELIT Recruitment 2026 is 29 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this NIELIT recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various posts in the National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT) recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from ITI (Electrical) to B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, M.Sc., and MBA. Please refer to the detailed eligibility criteria in the article for specific post requirements.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts in this NIELIT recruitment is 45 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NIELIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 200/- per post for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories. This fee is payable online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 45,000/- per month, depending on the post and their qualifications/experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for NIELIT Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q8. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for NIELIT Recruitment 2026 begins on 15 May 2026. Ensure you apply within the stipulated application window.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an online application and document verification, followed by shortlisting. Candidates may then appear for an online interview or test, and potentially a written or skill test if required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NIELIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
